---
title: "\'George Eliot and her Critics\' By the Editor and the author of \'Charles Lowder\' [Maria Trench]"
---

## \'George Eliot and her Critics\' By the Editor and the author of \'Charles Lowder\' [Maria Trench]

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1885
**Genre:** Non-fiction, literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (May 1885) 471-495

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
